title: Delete buckets
excerpt: description: Empty all objects from an R2 bucket and permanently delete it. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. To delete an R2 bucket, you must first remove all objects from it. Once the bucket is empty, you can delete it. Emptying a bucket deletes every object inside it. The bucket itself and its configuration (lifecycle rules, CORS, event notifications, custom domains) are preserved.
